name: VTIL_GetChildObjectId
title: VTIL_GetChildObjectId
syntax: long VTIL_GetChildObjectId(dbNode workingSetMaster, dword objectId, dword index, long & childObjectId); // form 1
description: Returns the ID of an object which is contained by a parent object.
You can obtain the number of child objects with method VTIL_GetNumberOfChildObjects.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function.
